entities.description: The practice of alternating pigeon pea and maize crops

entities.description: Nutritional benefits provided through crop production

entities.name: INCOME DIVERSIFICATION
entities.description: The process of increasing sources of income for farmers

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of agricultural production per unit area

entities.name: BIOMASS
entities.description: The total mass of plant material produced

entities.name: PLANT STAND
